records.display_name: Bus replacement between Ronkonkoma and Greenport

payload.claim_text: Bus service will replace train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday, to support track maintenance and crossing rehabilitations east of Ronkonkoma.
payload.subject: Ronkonkoma/Greenport Branch service adjustment

records.raw_text: Bus service will replace train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday, to support track maintenance and crossing rehabilitations east of Ronkonkoma.

records.raw_text: Funding for these projects is contained in the Long Island Rail Road Operating and MTA Capital Program budget.

records.display_name: Weekend service adjustment Brentwood to Ronkonkoma

payload.claim_text: With both main tracks out of service between Brentwood and Ronkonkoma and the single main track out of service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, trains will terminate and originate at Deer Park on an hourly basis. Bus service will replace train service in both directions for customers traveling to/from Brentwood, Central Islip, Ronkonkoma and all stations between Ronkonkoma and Greenport. Train service will remain at half hourly intervals to/from Farmingdale station.
payload.subject: Weekend switch and signal work service adjustments

records.raw_text: With both main tracks out of service between Brentwood and Ronkonkoma and the single main track out of service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, trains will terminate and originate at Deer Park on an hourly basis. Bus service will replace train service in both directions for customers traveling to/from Brentwood, Central Islip, Ronkonkoma and all stations between Ronkonkoma and Greenport. Train service will remain at half hourly intervals to/from Farmingdale station.

records.display_name: Extra westbound trains for St. Patrick's Day Parade

payload.claim_text: The Long Island Rail Road will operate two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches for customers traveling to New York City for the St. Patrick's Day parade.
payload.subject: St. Patrick's Day extra service

records.raw_text: the Long Island Rail Road will operate two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches for customers traveling to New York City for the St. Patrick's Day parade.

records.display_name: Hall Interlocking Expansion Project

description: Part of JCI Phase 2. A new rail bridge through the center of Jamaica's Hall Interlocking to accommodate two new parallel train routes to increase capacity east of the station.
Hall Interlocking expansion project supported during the March 4, 2024 - May 19, 2024 timetable period.
Expansion of Hall Interlocking

Part of the multi-phase Jamaica Capacity Improvements Program. Constructing a new 280-foot two-track railroad bridge over 150 Street and Atlantic Branch Track 1 using innovative bridge launching techniques. Will create two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station, eventually becoming Montauk Branch Track 2 and Main Line Track 2.
Expansion of Hall Interlocking.
